landing.hero_subtitle: Give your customers an AI assistant that speaks their mother tongue. Set up in 15 minutes. No coding. No servers. Just WhatsApp.
landing.step1_desc: Kirana store, clinic, coaching centre, mechanic, or travel agent. We know your business type.
landing.step2_desc: Select the languages your customers speak. Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, and 18 more.
landing.step3_desc: Configure your business hours, pricing, services, appointments, and order status. Five fields, five minutes.
landing.step4_desc: Get your WhatsApp Business number. Your customers call or message, and your AI assistant responds in their language.
landing.kirana_desc: Handle product inquiries, delivery status, and stock availability around the clock.
landing.clinic_desc: Book appointments, share consultation hours, and answer patient queries in their language.
landing.coaching_desc: Share batch schedules, fees, and admit new students without missing a call.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your business grows.
landing.footer_tagline: Powered by Sarvam AI's sovereign Indian language technology

onboarding.title: Set Up Your AI Assistant
onboarding.select_business: What type of business do you run?
onboarding.select_languages: Which languages do your customers speak?
onboarding.preview_desc: This is what your customers will experience when they message your WhatsApp number.
onboarding.launch_desc: Your AI assistant is ready. Share your WhatsApp number with customers and start saving time.
onboarding.hours_placeholder: e.g., Mon-Sat 9 AM to 8 PM, Sunday closed
onboarding.services_placeholder: e.g., General checkup, Blood tests, X-ray
onboarding.booking_placeholder: e.g., Call to book, or message with preferred date and time
onboarding.status_placeholder: e.g., Share your order number and we'll check the status

dashboard.no_conversations_desc: Share your WhatsApp number with customers to start receiving messages.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade as your business grows.
